description: These simple slip-on T-strap sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the heavy embellishments, making them perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and jeans.UpperLeather T-strap on the forefoot for a snug FitHeavy embellishments for added styleSoft leather lining for added comfortSynthetic footbed in an ergonomic design with a faded look for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
